item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 241700Z AUTO 34005KT 300V030 CAVOK 40/13 Q1013 TEMPO 4000 -TSRA FEW090CB
🟡 TAF LFOT 241700Z 2418/2518 VRB04KT CAVOK PROB40 TEMPO 2418/2503 VRB10G25KT 4000 -TSRA FEW090CB BECMG 2422/2424 08005KT PROB30 TEMPO 2513/2518 VRB15G30KT 4000 -TSRA FEW090CB
